'''Vox''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] and [[Information broker/Legends|informant]] born during the rule of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. She matched bounty postings to available hunters to maintain their anonymity. In this way, Vox arranged for an illegally posted bounty to be placed on [[Narloch]].

==Appearances==
